privileged_info_summary: The Civil Rights Act of 1964 (Public Law 88-352) was enacted on July 2, 1964, during the 88th Congress, 2d session. Title VII of the act is codified at 42 U.S.C. § 2000e et seq. The statute is cited as 78 Stat. 241 in the United States Statutes at Large. All metadata claims in the task correspond to verified legal citations and official legislative records.
